arts.ttl: Lazio Working on Extending the Contract of Napoli Target
arts.sum: Lazio have already started the procedure to renew the contract of Adam Marusic who is now one of the few remaining senators at the club following the summer revamp. The 31-year-old has been a loyal servant to the cause since joining the Italian capital side in the summer of 2017. The Montenegrin originally plays at […] The post Lazio Working on Extending the Contract of Napoli Target appeared first on The Laziali.
